rows.label: qev090402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ha ha! Not bad, newcomer. Your skills are
matched only by your impressive guts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Huh? A xeno?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0003
rows.name: Nngh... Aah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0004
rows.name: Hmm? You...you all are humans, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0005
rows.name:
P-please help me, okay? I ran
into trouble and hurt myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0006
rows.name:
My legs don't really work right
now, you know? So so if any
creatures show up, I'm a goner...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0007
rows.name:
That's a real shame. But I fear our
own people must come before you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0008
rows.name: I'll not waste precious time on a xeno.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0009
rows.name:
Wh-what? Please wait, okay? Aren't
Ma-non and humans...friends?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0010
rows.name:
Friends? Humans have no xeno friends!
Humans NEED no xeno friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0011
rows.name:
Come. Let us tarry with this
degenerate beast no longer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_JNK0010
rows.name: Follow

rows.label: qev090402_SEL0011
rows.name: Ignore the wounded Ma-non and move on.

rows.label: qev090402_JNK0020
rows.name: Demand

rows.label: qev090402_SEL0021
rows.name: Insist that you stay and help Jejebba.

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0012
rows.name:
I...I see... Sorry to bother
you, okay? I'll just try
to...find my own way to safety.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0013
rows.name:
I, uh, hope we both make it out
of this cave alive, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Forgive me. Sometimes my temper gets
the best of me when xenos are involved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0015
rows.name: I lose my head.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0016
rows.name:
But come, let us hurry. There
are humans waiting for our aid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0017
rows.name: ...Fine. But make it fast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0018
rows.name:
And know that while I think
this is folly, arguing would
just waste more precious time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0019
rows.name: Oh...really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0020
rows.name:
Well, there should be some muneria
flowers growing nearby, you know?
Can you maybe bring me some?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0021
rows.name:
I should be able to use them with
the healing device I built to to
get my legs working again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090402_MSG0022
rows.name:
Please find me those muneria
flowers, all right?![ST:wait ]
